items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Triggers actions, submits forms, or navigates. The most fundamental interactive element in the system.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Compact label for status, count, or category. Used inline alongside other content.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Structured data display with sortable columns, optional footer, and title. Use for records that benefit from columnar scanning.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Grouped container for related content. Cards establish visual hierarchy and organize information into scannable units.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Single-line text field for user data entry. Pairs with Label and supports disabled, readonly, and error states.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Switches between related content sections without page navigation.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Dropdown for choosing one value from a list. Use when options exceed 5 items.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Placeholder loading state that previews content shape while data loads.

items.name: chart-area-interactive
items.title: Area Chart
items.description: Interactive stacked area chart with a time-range filter. Shows trends across two data series with a tooltip and legend.

items.name: chart-bar-default
items.title: Bar Chart
items.description: Simple bar chart displaying a single data series. Best for comparing discrete categories or time periods at a glance.

items.name: chart-bar-stacked
items.title: Bar Chart Stacked
items.description: Stacked bar chart comparing two data series with a legend. Ideal for showing part-to-whole relationships across time.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Binary selection control. Available as a simple checkbox, with description text, or inside a bordered card row.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Contextual message for informational, success, warning, or error states. Supports an optional dismiss control.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Navigation control for moving through paged content. Includes previous/next arrows and numbered page buttons.

items.name: button-group
items.title: Button Group
items.description: A set of related buttons joined into a single connected control. Ideal for toggleable or segmented options.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: Single-select control for mutually exclusive options. Shows all choices simultaneously for easy comparison.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar
items.description: Composable, themeable sidebar with icon-collapse, Sheet mobile drawer, and SidebarGroup / SidebarMenu primitives matching shadcn.

items.name: chart-pie-donut
items.title: Donut Chart
items.description: Donut pie chart with five segments and a centred total-visitors label. Uses chart-* color tokens so it adapts to any active theme.

items.name: chart-line-dots
items.title: Line Chart
items.description: Smooth line chart with dot markers for two series. Best for showing trends and changes over time.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Collapsible panels for showing and hiding content sections. Smooth height animation on open/close.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: Circular user profile image with an initials fallback when the image is unavailable.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Accessible navigation trail showing the current page location within a hierarchy.

items.name: carousel
items.title: Carousel
items.description: Horizontally sliding content container with prev/next navigation and optional auto-play.

items.name: stepper
items.title: Stepper
items.description: Horizontal step progress indicator for multi-step flows. Completed steps show a checkmark.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: Full month calendar grid with date selection. Supports single date and range selection modes.

items.name: command
items.title: Command
items.description: Filterable command palette with grouped results. Use for search, navigation, and quick actions.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Modal dialog with overlay, scale animation, and accessible focus management via Base UI.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: Slide-in panel from the right, left, or bottom edge. Built on Base UI Dialog for accessibility.

items.name: menu-bar
items.title: Menu Bar
items.description: Horizontal menu bar with keyboard-navigable menus. Ideal for application-style top toolbars.

items.name: top-nav
items.title: Top Navigation
items.description: Sticky top navigation bar with brand, breadcrumb trail, and right-aligned action area.

items.name: resizable
items.title: Resizable
items.description: Drag-to-resize panel layout with a visual handle divider. Supports horizontal and vertical splits.
